channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: MLS Aims to Attract New Fans as World Cup Approaches
item.description: The 1994 World Cup sparked soccer growth in the U.S., leading to MLS. Now the league hopes to build on that momentum.

item.title: Israeli Paraglider Works to Save Swifts Nesting at Western Wall
item.description: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times, and one paraglider is trying to protect them.

item.title: Cuban artist and dissident exiled after five-year prison term arrives in the US
item.description: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident artist and musician, reached Miami on Saturday following his release from prison.

item.title: Five clever design tricks to make a small home appear larger
item.description: Living in a compact space does not have to feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of more room.
